textByHash.0804119b264b9f6c2046023fec73a1c7875ad7c0: You set it free. Oh, please don't hurt me!
textByHash.14c44a9215c7f423169598dbfc15dbc2aee3e097: Pretty please with a cherry on top?
textByHash.1746ebf176e82bbc5cf646a2d9d314aaaedec904: You should know your place, adventurer. This is no concern of yours now.
textByHash.1f65649344824fccb9789328e75e2d0b26c0d78a: I will, I will. Next time we'll use a stronger cage.
textByHash.368c6113be328ee6b0d93a251c61dd064193b6fc: You like it? It's simply fabulous, isn't it? A real marvel of modern design made just for my fellow alchemists and I!
textByHash.3c4a4911072a47bb5097e9542df15c93ca42476e: Or at least it would if we could ever get it finished.
textByHash.48b38d8cd95341eda56d9c43c41ba4cee4012b17: Do you know the outpost north of Ardougne?
textByHash.4e41066c5161015d6ba79c9988ef72e49e69c3f5: Oh, what a wondrous person you are!
textByHash.5652d12ce9bb48fa986f81440b70fc9d275979a4: Go have a word with Bonafido the head builder. See if you can't get him off his backside to do some work. Oh, and I'm Effigy by the way.
textByHash.6b4f13a265c58d7d3a5db7c664fb6ca9a947dba6: That's a weak excuse for a very feeble personality.
textByHash.6e8f21ed42c15727f13f29da3903ab4f2bc85065: Don't worry. It has no soul; it has no worth.
textByHash.707e0ab52c1be45a2ec7f284efa26a0f07aa6cd7: The sun is shining... The birds are singing...
textByHash.72f3e6754086c4289106fc0f6d36d4156534865e: even magic needs a certain level of rules and laws to work.
textByHash.751f94eda1dc8d4124fb30abc71093ea12b551ac: another, and now we have the ability to create life itself! We owe much to the power of Guthix, for without the life essence he left below ground, we would never have been able to bring this tower alive!
textByHash.7807b552a4cb8e2795f22064981b3fbed1563a47: It begins! The first day of creation!
textByHash.842681d6188b65b2e7071342515827c15ad8b4c9: create life with such ease. We realised we should be able to use this powerful substance, but we needed to bring together our magic along with the logical construction of the builders. It seemed through our experiments that
textByHash.85e9b8f12ef6e5b5f2efbd1b60a04f03ed5aef04: They've gone on strike for some petty reason about the tower being too weird. I really can't understand those men.
textByHash.89bfbbd1dfd895acf20410dafb6ca4080fb73634: It is time, my friends! The culmination of our work is complete!
textByHash.89dbcb6efd2347630d3c17e63db0109b27680a65: To the top of the tower, fellow alchemists!
textByHash.8b0033bab60bc8ff92f7e3fca0d0d5d1abff8541: Well, the King was going to make that into an alchemy lab for us, but some fool ruined our plans!
textByHash.8b46b32402eb23ce5f71ec1168bf70d7de43fe8d: Have you spoken to our wondrously fabulous creation yet?
textByHash.8eea12b1ecc401d9925e25876707b579b861b0b7: A great many years of planning and preparation has brought us here, my fellow alchemists. Now we have... The Tower of Life! We can already create gold, we can already transform matter from one thing to
textByHash.94c2cba78c27dd92c4e6a1493fb0201839d16663: Marvellous! So you can bring this tower to life!
textByHash.95b7309f8b281d2e1aad0daf57394a96c1a1b23e: Hehe. Just fix the tower. You'll soon see.
textByHash.97a17c2659ebd8bc5212aa8068da59c906d59ebe: Hey! Maybe you could talk to them?
textByHash.9dfa2404a95aa955e5a906550da5ae0324dc123d: I'll make sure you're compensated. You won't be forgotten for this!
textByHash.a135e671e1c90d9660cdc84d30e33a7cceb72132: I know, I know. But think of how fantastical it will be when it is finished!
textByHash.a2426de6fddee4c4987b9abe375a80a31b5a44c4: Ah, it's our helper. Thank you for fixing the tower; we will reward you greatly.
textByHash.a62fdfa74f292c7ed3b80a62e0cd3453169352e7: You look like a sturdy chap.
textByHash.a684f8135eb32d7f266b3b7b4f394ee083c1fdec: Don't I recognise you from somewhere?
textByHash.aebb5a1c2caa84abc4370b05235ee14e23953f9e: Please, we just wanted to experiment. We wanted to create life. There's a dungeon under the tower. Long ago we found a strange source of energy that we believe was left behind by the great Guthix. He used to
textByHash.afd2c599116adc4f28be456d0c6ef36a9dceb343: It's going to have a use that will change this world!
textByHash.b20066a572ec2aa8365dec87c77549d0b2de1b1f: Oh, I have a good feeling about this.
textByHash.bca1786e33f647e4f911570520da40d4e77deb18: What a keen eye this chap has! But imagine this: a gargantuan cylinder of expert design, incorporating an inventive inner spiral walkway to multiple planes of wondrous inhabitance!
textByHash.be4535a7284f2673d0b48c0fce4bc4af9271184a: Maybe you could finish the work?
textByHash.c4ac8b2b00b01bf3ed61303a1342a66ecf576f20: Yes, be still and quit your moaning.
textByHash.c7eac3b959d2856b6f7c45edff4c3af9649c685e: Come on! This is the chance of a lifetime!
textByHash.dc79712a3bba04ae87bd6aaaeb279148864f74a5: That's fantastic! Oh, I'm so pleased.
textByHash.e07d380be3c5c659da80c19ae1de3aa3b94ac818: Good on you! I knew you would help us!
textByHash.e0e3776bbfe1d6929158e64d0a7eb9c9ef329244: What a hideously, unforgiveable and insensitive combination of dialogue to supply to a friend!
textByHash.ee1a3deb49e87257216b87cb837c3419db939e22: Maybe you could go have a talk with it?
textByHash.ef3301e64e20995554cb2dda12eda8d7bcad7d8e: Years of devoted work; it's complete!
textByHash.fa753918932a2b72fd987940165125163eb9de7d: I know, I know. This is a truly dangerous creation, of all proportions.
